data.title: Add ESCALATE_REVIEW orchestrator dispatch, opus guard, and deep-tier dedup to REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md
data.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

## Description
Add escalation dispatch logic to plugins/dso/docs/workflows/REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md as new Step 4a (after reviewer return, BEFORE overlay dispatch Step 4b):

1. Parse escalate_review from reviewer-findings.json
2. If present and non-empty: dispatch next-tier reviewer with focused context (only uncertain findings)
3. Tier mapping: haiku->sonnet, sonnet->opus
4. OPUS GUARD: If current tier is opus, log warning 'Opus reviewer emitted ESCALATE_REVIEW — ignoring (opus is terminal tier)' and skip escalation
5. DEEP-TIER DEDUP: After opus arch synthesis completes (NOT before), read escalate_review from the synthesized reviewer-findings.json. The arch agent forwards uncertain finding indices from its synthesized output. Merge and deduplicate by finding_index across the synthesis. Dispatch single opus escalation with merged uncertain findings.
   - Explicit slot paths: reviewer-findings-a.json, reviewer-findings-b.json, reviewer-findings-c.json
6. Escalated reviewer severity determinations replace original uncertain finding severities
7. INSERTION POINT: Step 4a runs after Step 4 returns and BEFORE overlay dispatch (Step 4b). Rationale: escalation may change finding severities, which affects whether overlays are warranted.
8. ESCALATE-FIRST ordering: escalation happens before resolution loop entry

Unit test exemption: Orchestrator workflow prompt — no executable code. Behavior depends on LLM following instructions.

## File Impact
- plugins/dso/docs/workflows/REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md (modify)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test suite passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md contains Step 4a escalation logic
  Verify: grep -q 'escalate_review' plugins/dso/docs/workflows/REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md
- [ ] Opus guard documented
  Verify: grep -qi 'opus.*terminal\|opus.*ignor' plugins/dso/docs/workflows/REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md
- [ ] Deep-tier dedup documented
  Verify: grep -qi 'dedup\|deduplic' plugins/dso/docs/workflows/REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md
